data.body: PASS 1 (G1G2 — edit-set/scope accuracy) for Cluster 1: verified all four named sites + symbols exist exactly (`signing._canonical_payload`, `schema.canonical_json`/`content_hash`, `conflict_resolver._hash_value`, `mutation.serialize_manifest`); seam `canonical_str`/`canonical_bytes` exists and adding keyword-only params is backward-compatible with the 6 positional importers + parity tests. One unenumerated-consumer note logged (tests asserting `serialize_manifest`/`wf.content_hash` outside the artifact dirs).
